narrative:
Loudon (precinct in Carroll County) has 587 registered voters, with 53.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 32.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 17.9 percentage points.
